case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MICHELLE MARSHALL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHALL, MICHELLE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE AN ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND VACATE CLERK'S JDUGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DEFAULT OF MAR-21-2011 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF MAR-21-2011 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
